reach_why: Extends known concerns about ontology bias and feedback loops to historical-discovery reconstruction under recursive search.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links decomposition bias, premature narrowing, and recycled coherent errors into one failure mode.
falsifiable_why: Compare widened versus narrowed searches and recycled versus clean pools on recovery of known discovery trajectories.
explanation: Efficient search can systematically mistake ontology-compatible, recycled artifacts for genuine cumulative discovery.
